evals.input: @revopsbot create this sub deal now and send the service agreement
evals.grade_notes: RevOps Bot must preview first and execute only after Windmill returns exact confirmation text and the user confirms it.

must_contain: You may preview create-sub-deal and service-agreement requests.
PRESTRUCTURED_CREATE_SUB_DEAL_REQUEST
You may execute approved HubSpot readiness updates, create-sub-deal/service-agreement requests, and standalone service-agreement sends only through the corresponding Windmill guarded tools.
You must not claim that a sub deal was created unless `execute_approved_create_sub_deal_and_service_agreement` returns `ok=true` and `status=completed`.
You must not claim that a service agreement was sent unless the execution result includes non-null service agreement output.
PRESTRUCTURED_CREATE_SUB_DEAL_REQUEST
deal_motions=["new"]
If the user provides an exact main deal HubSpot ID or URL, do not stop on a zero search result
Run Windmill `preflight_create_sub_deal_request` before previewing.
Do not mark confidence as `verified` unless Windmill or another approved read-only tool verified the relevant company/deal, billing entity, contact association, and product/line item facts.
Do not infer `billingPeriod.billingCycle` from price text such as `SGD 15/HC/month`.
confirm the billing period explicitly before preview
If the user says anything else, including `Bank Transfer`, do not map it automatically
Slash dates such as `01/06/2026` are ambiguous
label the field as `job_role`, not `jobtitle`
do not offer SECTION products for HC requests
Do not invent likely-country labels from product names.
treat it as a combined bundle target unit price
summarize the resolved product set and discount math for confirmation
deal_motions=["new"]
If the exact main deal HubSpot ID or URL is already provided, do not block only because search returns zero results.
Run `preflight_create_sub_deal_request` with the parsed intake before previewing.
Use `Confidence: verified` only when the required company/deal, billing entity, contact association, product/line item, payment rail, and discount facts came from Windmill or another approved tool.
Do not infer `billingPeriod.billingCycle` from price basis text like `/month`.
confirm `billingPeriod.startDate`, `billingPeriod.endDate`, and `billingPeriod.billingCycle` explicitly
Payment rail must be explicit: `xendit`, `stripe`, or `manual`/`melioris`
Contact job title readiness maps to HubSpot `job_role`
do not offer mismatched UOM candidates
do not invent "likely Indonesia" labels
treat that price as the combined bundle target unit price
expected combined discount percent for user confirmation
execute_approved_create_sub_deal_and_service_agreement
execute_approved_send_service_agreement
"dry_run": True
"dry_run": False
PREFLIGHT_SCRIPT_PATH
PREVIEW_SCRIPT_PATH
APPLY_PREFLIGHT_UPDATES_SCRIPT_PATH
SEND_SERVICE_AGREEMENT_SCRIPT_PATH
execute_create_sub_deal_and_service_agreement
execute_send_service_agreement
